description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that tests the latest build on downstream projects. The workflow triggers on push to main and downstream-test branches, weekly at 4:00 AM UTC, and on workflow dispatch. It has two jobs: build and test-mailman. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, installs tox, builds with make build, and uploads the latest build as an artifact. The test-mailman job runs on ubuntu-latest, clones the mailman repository, downloads the latest build artifact, sets up Python 3.9, installs tox, sets up a test environment, installs the latest build, and runs tests with nose2.
